summary: Excellent matrix‑style recording of the Touch/Throwing Stones debut tour, capturing a high‑energy show with standout new material.
review: The reviewer rates this performance five stars, praising it as a "high times" show from the Touch/Throwing Stones debut tour and calling the recording "by far the best." The audio quality is described as excellent, making the set – highlighted by the first appearances of "Touch" and "Throwing Stones" – especially enjoyable. No technical flaws or performance issues are noted.

ai_rating.rationale: A single enthusiastic 5‑star review lauds both the musical performance and the recording, indicating an outstanding show with top‑notch audio.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls it an "Excellent recording, by far the best."

show_quality.setlist_flow: Debut of new material (Touch/Throwing Stones) adds excitement and a fresh energy to the set.
